---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or extension to zenflow.
title: "[feat] "
labels: [enhancement, triage]
---

## Problem

<!--
What user-facing problem does this solve? Concrete scenario, not abstract
"would be nice". If you have a workaround today, describe it so we can see
the cost gap.
-->

## Proposed shape

<!--
Smallest API / YAML / CLI surface that solves the problem. If a `With*`
option, sketch its signature. If a YAML field, sketch the schema fragment.
If a CLI flag, sketch the help text.
-->

## Why zenflow specifically

<!--
zenflow is intentionally narrow: declarative YAML, hub-and-spoke messaging,
single-coordinator routing. If the request fits a peer-to-peer or imperative
shape better, it may belong in a wrapper / adjacent tool instead. Brief
note on why this proposal lines up with zenflow's design helps triage.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other shapes you weighed and why they did not win. Optional. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Related issues, prior art in other engines (CrewAI / AutoGen / LangGraph), etc. -->
